name: RHS Glavkos (Y 6)
events: 21 Jul 1941 Glavkos sank the Italian sailing vessel San Nicola (21 GRT) with gunfire 4 miles north-west of Rhodes.
22 Jul 1941 Glavkos sank a sailing vessel with gunfire off Castelorizzo.
10 Nov 1941 Glavkos (Lt.Cdr. B. Aslanoglou) torpedoed and damaged the German merchant Norburg (2392 GRT) off Suda Bay, Crete.

18 Nov 1941 In a signal timed 1118 B/18 from the Capt. S.10, HMS P 34 (Lt. P.R.H. Harrison, DSC, RN) and RHS Glavkos (Lt.Cdr. V. Arslanoglou) were ordered to proceed through positions 35°51'N, 15°15'E and and 36°00'N, 14°53'E to arrive at Malta at 0730 B/21 and 0730 B/22 respectively. (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
